name: VectorChat
notes: SN40 (netuid 40) has since changed hands: on-chain identity now points to RalphLabsAI's "Ralph" subnet (see registry/providers/ralphlabs.json and registry/subnets/ralph.json), and the historical VectorChat/chunking_subnet repository (github.com/salahawk/chunking_subnet) has been dead 2+ years. This provider record is kept for historical reference only and is no longer referenced by any tracked surface.
public_notes: Historical provider profile for VectorChat, the team formerly behind netuid 40 ("Chunking"). The subnet has since changed hands; VectorChat is no longer associated with any tracked SN40 surface.
